generated_oml:
instance AmbientDS18S20Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer measuring ambient temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalDS18S20SensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer measuring internal temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedA
]

instance InternalDS18S20SensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer measuring internal temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedB
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214x214x3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs on PCB to handle ~4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow operating at 12V or 24V controlled via optocouplers for signal isolation"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Hardware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller hardware"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientDS18S20Sensor
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedA : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalDS18S20SensorA
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedB : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalDS18S20SensorB
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from ambient DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataA : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from internal DS18S20 sensor A"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedA
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from internal DS18S20 sensor B"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedB
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal energy balance model with parameters C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extended thermal model with parameters C_air, G_box, C_heater, G_heater"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance ScipyCalibrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy tool for non-linear least squares calibration of thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source repository for storing DT code and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimality"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyThresholds
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAdjustments
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in thermal system components"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for thermal system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration through optimization for improved prediction accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationParameters
]

instance CalibrationParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration-derived model parameters (e.g., C_air, G_box) used to improve prediction accuracy"
]

instance SafetyThresholds : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety thresholds derived from monitoring outputs for thermal incubator"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection insight for thermal system components"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state of thermal system components"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from thermal models"
]

instance ControlAdjustments : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustments to heatbed and fan based on monitoring outputs"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Edge controller using Raspberry Pi 4 Model B for real-time processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical thermal incubator system comprising styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ volume), heatbed, fan, DS18S20 sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains AmbientDS18S20Sensor, InternalDS18S20SensorA, InternalDS18S20SensorB, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4Hardware, PCBWithMOSFETs, PowerSupply, StyrofoamContainer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands to control heatbed and fan (on/off states) are sent from DT components via RabbitMQ to the controller, which executes bang-bang control using parameters like heating duration (H) and waiting duration (C)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server hosting DT components that communicate with the PT via message queues; low-level driver interfaces with hardware, controller executes control logic, and simulation models process data for prediction."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') of the physical system, where the DT continuously monitors and predicts current behavior during deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated as more accurate for thermal inertia; temperature uniformity tested with sensor discrepancies up to 7°C (reduced to 6°C with 18V fan); calibration minimizes residual error via least squares optimization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker using AMQP protocol for data exchange between PT (Raspberry Pi) and DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT components deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B (on-premises edge device)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety; bang-bang controller enforces upper/lower temperature limits (UL/LL) to prevent overheating."
]
